_meta.title: processing_confidence_score
_meta.previous: v1.1.0 (locked, pressure-test passed); v1.0.0 before that
_meta.runtime_independence: Computed entirely from Agisoft processing report + processing manifest + deliverable files + pre_processing handoff data (source artifacts only — NOT pre_processing_score output). Does not read drone_score, base_station_score, gcp_score, check_point_score, or pre_processing_score outputs at runtime.
_meta.design_summary: Four-block evidence-based processing confidence chain. Single scalar processing_score per survey. Owns check-point residual analysis as the moment-of-truth survey accuracy measurement. Agisoft Metashape v1 engine; other engines (ODM, Pix4D, RealityCapture) deferred to v2+. Processing report REQUIRED (Option A locked) — processing_score=null when absent because the report IS the evidence base (unlike pre_processing where it is supplementary). verification_status field separates verification-result from quality-score, mirroring pre_processing pattern.
_meta.fix_log: v1.0.0 (pre-lock): pressure-test against three reference reports caught rank-ordering issue (Report B scored below Report A despite operational expectation). Diagnosed: BA4 penalty for missing b1/b2 was too steep (30 points × 0.10 weight = 3.0 BA points, exceeding moment-of-truth gain). Fix 1 applied: BA4 threshold softened — missing b1/b2 now scores 90 instead of 70. Rank ordering restored to A < B < C. Problem #6 severity downgraded MEDIUM → LOW. PROC_OPTIMIZATION_INCOMPLETE severity downgraded MEDIUM → LOW (advisory).
_meta.v11_additions: STRICTLY ADDITIVE extension over v1.0. Adds 5 per-deliverable views (ortho_score, dsm_score, dtm_score, point_cloud_score, mesh_3d_score) as configurations over locked v1.0 indicator layer. No changes to v1.0 indicators, weights, blocks, or scoring. Each view is a diagnostic readout answering "what is the quality story for THIS specific deliverable?" — not a separate score. When a deliverable file is absent, the corresponding view returns null with file_missing reason; processing_score itself remains unaffected.
v111_clarifications: Global gate: clarified that PROC_OUTPUT_CRS_MISMATCH FORCES processing_score=0 (implementation force-zeros the apex), not via 0.15-weight block arithmetic.
Per-deliverable views: when the output-CRS gate trips, all views return null (reason=output_crs_mismatch) since every deliverable is in the wrong frame.
Indicators L3I_PROC_021/024/025 are always N/A on v1.7 reports (no absolute marker XYZ); detection is v2.
Indicator L3I_PROC_035 returns N/A (redistribute) when the report omits void fraction (v1.7); no optimistic default.
L3I_PROC_005 precalibration penalty is asymmetric: only 'expected-but-not-loaded' is penalised.

processing_score.workflow: Evidence-based (CBMI does not perform processing; chain evaluates Agisoft processing report + deliverables + manifest)
processing_score.global_gate_action: Forces processing_score = 0 (global gate; the implementation force-zeros the apex rather than relying on 0.15-weight block-of-blocks arithmetic). Also sets deliverable_output_score = 0 and nulls every per-deliverable view (reason=output_crs_mismatch). PROC_OUTPUT_CRS_MISMATCH fires with severity CATASTROPHIC at the global_gate stage.
processing_score.verification_status_field: Separate categorical field reporting CP-related quality. VALUES: VERIFIED_RESIDUALS_PASS (CPs ≥5 AND CP_RMSE ≤target), VERIFIED_RESIDUALS_MARGINAL (CPs ≥5 AND CP_RMSE 1-2× target), VERIFIED_RESIDUALS_FAIL (CPs ≥5 AND CP_RMSE >2× target), UNVERIFIED_INSUFFICIENT_CPS (1-4 CPs), UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS (0 CPs). NEVER score-gating. Surveys can be high-quality without verification; the score reflects quality, verification_status reports independent verification result.
processing_score.null_handling: processing_score = null when processing report is not uploaded (Option A locked). Per-deliverable views in v1.1 also return null when their underlying deliverable file is missing. Note: this is meaningfully different from pre_processing_score which uses Option B (report optional with graceful degradation) — because processing has almost no non-report evidence (the report IS the evidence base), Option B would produce fictional scores.
processing_score.scope_note: Deep-diagnostic chain for processing-stage failures. CBMI does NOT run Agisoft — this chain evaluates the Agisoft processing report + deliverable files + processing manifest. Owns the moment-of-truth check-point residual analysis. Runtime-independent of upstream chains — uses pre_processing source artifacts and manifest (NOT pre_processing_score outputs) for cross-source comparisons. Cross-subsystem coupling deferred to future capture_score integration layer.
processing_score.source_file_set: Agisoft Metashape Processing Report (required), Processing Manifest (required), Deliverable Files (required for completeness check and v1.1 per-deliverable views), Pre-Processing Handoff Data (for cross-source comparisons).
processing_score.paths_supported: Agisoft Metashape v1.7.x reference; v1.6+ parser keys off section headers not page numbers. Other engines (ODM, Pix4D, RealityCapture) deferred to v2+.
processing_score.known_limitations: Processing report is REQUIRED — without it, processing_score is null. The majority of third-party-processed surveys may lack the Agisoft report; for those, the future delivery layer evaluates deliverable artifacts directly. processing_score serves the report-bearing population only. Localized reconstruction collapse (#37, IM7) detection is PARTIAL in v1 — uses global proxies (tie density, reprojection). Full spatial detection of collapse zones requires v2 density-map visual analysis. The mining-most-relevant failure case (CP RMSE passes while volumes wrong because CPs do not sit on collapsed region) is partially detected only. Per-camera position outliers (#8, BA3) detection is ENSEMBLE-ONLY in v1. Per-camera detail visible only in Camera Locations ellipse map figure; v2 visual analysis required for outlier detection. Software version known-buggy list (#33, DO8) is v2 deliverable — v1 carries the indicator as advisory only with zero scoring weight. CP-GCP statistical independence check (from GCP#2) deferred to v2 — needs statistical analysis beyond report fields. High altitude variance (from Drone FLG_011) deferred to v2 — needs visual overlap-map analysis. Parser must key off section headers (Survey Data / Camera Calibration / Camera Locations / Ground Control Points / Digital Elevation Model / Processing Parameters) NOT page numbers, since Agisoft changes layout between versions. Every evidence cite has been validated against the v1.7.6 reference reports. Cross-source comparison rows (CV4 role consistency, CV5 GCP typo, DO3 internal transform) are dual-dependency — they require both Agisoft report and pre_processing handoff data. When manifest or pre_processing data is incomplete, these indicators degrade to N/A. BA4 (optimization completeness) threshold softened per v1.0 pressure-test: missing b1/b2 → 90 (was 70). Rationale: skipping b1/b2 is a minor operator preference, not a major quality differentiator.

building_blocks.question: Did the bundle adjustment solve well? Cameras aligned, calibration sound, optimization complete?
building_blocks.failure_owner: Photogrammetry processing operator (Agisoft settings + input data)
building_blocks.operator_action: Investigate convergence, alignment, calibration; reprocess with adjusted parameters
building_blocks.indicators_within: ba_reprojection_score(0.20), camera_alignment_score(0.20), camera_position_ensemble_score(0.15), optimization_completeness_score(0.10), precalibration_loaded_score(0.10), camera_model_consistency_score(0.10), self_calibration_quality_score(0.10), max_reproj_outlier_score(0.05)

building_blocks.question: Did image matching produce dense, well-distributed tie points and quality depth maps?
building_blocks.failure_owner: Photogrammetry processing operator + capture quality (overlap, texture)
building_blocks.operator_action: Reprocess at higher quality settings; investigate texture/overlap if sparse
building_blocks.indicators_within: alignment_accuracy_setting_score(0.20), depth_quality_setting_score(0.20), tiepoint_density_score(0.15), tiepoint_multiplicity_score(0.10), filtering_mode_appropriateness_score(0.10), marker_image_coverage_score(0.10), localized_reconstruction_score(0.10), atmospheric_artifact_composite_score(0.05)

building_blocks.question: Were GCPs adequate and well-distributed? Do check points verify accuracy? (Moment-of-truth block)
building_blocks.failure_owner: Survey design + capture + processing operator (marker roles)
building_blocks.operator_action: Reprocess with correct roles; re-survey if control inadequate
building_blocks.aggregator: weighted average; cp_rmse_score is primary moment-of-truth indicator at 0.35 within block
building_blocks.indicators_within: cp_rmse_score(0.35), gcp_rmse_score(0.15), per_cp_outlier_score(0.10), marker_role_consistency_score(0.08), gcp_coord_consistency_score(0.07), cp_count_statistical_score(0.06), gcp_count_in_bundle_score(0.05), gcp_bundle_distribution_score(0.04), gcp_vertical_coverage_score(0.03), z_xy_residual_ratio_score(0.03), per_marker_pix_error_score(0.02), reconstruction_drift_composite_score(0.01), no_markers_at_all_flag_score(0.01), no_gcps_used_flag_score(0.00)

building_blocks.question: Are output deliverables in the right frame, well-formed, classified correctly?
building_blocks.operator_action: Reproject; reprocess with ground classification; investigate void interpolation
building_blocks.aggregator: weighted average; DO1 zeros block when CRS mismatch
building_blocks.indicators_within: output_crs_project_match_score(0.30), output_crs_projection_score(0.20), internal_transform_consistency_score(0.15), dtm_classification_score(0.10), dem_void_interpolation_score(0.08), dem_resolution_score(0.07), deliverable_completeness_score(0.05), software_version_score(0.05)

indicators.threshold_summary: ≤1.5 pix → 100; 1.5-2.5 → 70 + PROC_BA_REPROJ_ELEVATED; 2.5-3.5 → 30 + PROC_BA_REPROJ_HIGH; >3.5 → 0 + PROC_BA_CONVERGENCE_FAIL.
aligned/total ≥0.98 → 100; 0.95-0.98 → 70 + PROC_CAMERAS_PARTIAL_ALIGN; 0.90-0.95 → 30 + PROC_CAMERAS_POOR_ALIGN; <0.90 → 0 + PROC_CAMERAS_SEVERE_ALIGN_FAIL.

indicators.justification: SHEET (v1 ensemble; per-camera outliers deferred to v2)
indicators.threshold_summary: total_err / GSD ≤ 2× → 100; 2-4× → 70 + PROC_CAMERA_POS_ELEVATED; 4-8× → 30; >8× → 0 + PROC_CAMERA_POS_SEVERE. Per-camera outlier detection requires v2 visual analysis of Camera Locations ellipse map.

all 10 params {f,b1,b2,cx,cy,k1-k3,p1,p2} present → 100; b1/b2 missing → 90 + PROC_OPTIMIZATION_INCOMPLETE (softened per v1.0 pressure-test: missing b1/b2 is minor optimization preference, not major quality differentiator); more missing → 70; severely incomplete → 30.
manifest expectation matches report → 100; mismatch (expected loaded, report shows "No") → 30 + PROC_PRECALIB_NOT_LOADED.
manifest camera model matches report → 100; mismatch → 30 + PROC_CAMERA_MODEL_MISMATCH.

indicators.justification: SHEET (v0.2 reviewer fix: compound condition to avoid universal flagging)
indicators.threshold_summary: precalibrated=Yes → 100; precalibrated=No AND |K| <0.90 → 100; |K| 0.90-0.95 → 70; >0.95 AND degraded reprojection/CP residuals → 30 + PROC_SELF_CALIB_ILL_CONDITIONED (advisory).
max/rms ≤10 → 100; 10-20 → 70 + PROC_REPROJ_OUTLIERS (advisory); 20-50 → 50; >50 → 30 + PROC_REPROJ_SEVERE_OUTLIERS (advisory). Almost always elevated in practice — keep advisory.
Highest/High → 100; Medium → 50 + PROC_ALIGNMENT_ACCURACY_LOW; Low/Lowest → 0 + PROC_ALIGNMENT_ACCURACY_CRITICAL.
High/Ultra → 100; Medium → 60 + PROC_DEPTH_QUALITY_MEDIUM (advisory); Low/Lowest → 20 + PROC_DEPTH_QUALITY_LOW.
≥3M/km² → 100; 1-3M → 70 + PROC_SPARSE_TIEPOINTS; 0.5-1M → 30 + PROC_VERY_SPARSE_TIEPOINTS; <0.5M → 0.
≥4 → 100; 3-4 → 70 + PROC_LOW_MULTIPLICITY; 2.5-3 → 30 + PROC_VERY_LOW_MULTIPLICITY; <2.5 → 0.

indicators.display_name: Depth Filtering Mode vs Site Type
indicators.threshold_summary: match (flat-structured=Mild, vegetated=Aggressive, mining-pit=Moderate) → 100; mismatch → 50 + PROC_FILTERING_INSUFFICIENT or PROC_FILTERING_OVERSMOOTHED.
per-marker: ≥5 images → 100; 3-4 → 50 + PROC_MARKER_WEAK; <3 → 0 + PROC_MARKER_INSUFFICIENT_IMAGES. Aggregate via mean − 0.25 × (100 − min).

indicators.justification: SHEET (v1 partial / v2 full per v0.2 reviewer)
indicators.threshold_summary: v1: IF tiepoint_density <1M/km² OR DEM has visible voids → 50 + PROC_LOCALIZED_RECON_COLLAPSE (advisory). v2: density-map parsing for honest spatial detection. **Documented v1 limitation — full detection requires v2.**
Composite condition → 50 + PROC_ATMOSPHERIC_ARTIFACT_SUSPECTED (advisory cross-handoff to drone chain).

cp_rmse/target ≤1 → 100 + verification_status=VERIFIED_RESIDUALS_PASS; 1-2× → 60 + VERIFIED_RESIDUALS_MARGINAL + PROC_CP_RMSE_MARGINAL; >2× → 0 + VERIFIED_RESIDUALS_FAIL + PROC_CP_RMSE_FAIL. N/A when 0 CPs.
≤target → 100; 1-2× → 70 + PROC_GCP_RMSE_MARGINAL; 2-5× → 30 + PROC_GCP_RMSE_HIGH; >5× → 0 + PROC_GCP_RMSE_REJECT. N/A when 0 GCPs.

indicators.justification: SHEET (covers PP#32 target washed away + CP#14 mark disturbed)
indicators.threshold_summary: per-CP: cp_total/mean ≤1.5 → 100; 1.5-2 → 70 + PROC_CP_OUTLIER_MILD; 2-3 → 30 + PROC_CP_OUTLIER_SEVERE; >3 → 0 + PROC_CP_OUTLIER_REJECT. Aggregate via mean − 0.25 × (100 − min).
all markers match → 100; any mismatch → 30 + PROC_ROLE_MISMATCH (CRITICAL). Both directions covered (CP→GCP or GCP→CP).
per-GCP match within noise → 100; any mismatch beyond noise → 30 + PROC_GCP_TYPO.
indicators.v1_limitation: v1.7 Agisoft reports emit no absolute marker XYZ -> always N/A on real reports; the within-noise coordinate comparison runs only when abs coords are present. Real-data detection is v2.

indicators.threshold_summary: ≥20 → 100; 10-19 → 80; 5-9 → 60 + PROC_CP_COUNT_STATISTICAL_WEAK; 1-4 → 30 + PROC_CP_COUNT_INSUFFICIENT; 0 → 0 + verification_status=UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS.
≥5 → 100; 3-4 → 50 + PROC_GCP_COUNT_MARGINAL; <3 → 0 + PROC_GCP_COUNT_INSUFFICIENT (also fires PROC_NO_GCPS_USED if 0).
coverage ≥80% extent → 100; 60-80% → 60 + PROC_GCPS_CLUSTERED_IN_BUNDLE; <60% → 30 + PROC_GCPS_SEVERELY_CLUSTERED.
indicators.v1_limitation: Requires absolute GCP positions not present in v1.7 reports -> always N/A; spatial distribution detection is v2.

indicators.threshold_summary: z_spread_gcps / z_range_terrain ≥0.6 → 100; 0.3-0.6 → 60 + PROC_GCPS_NO_VERTICAL_COVERAGE_MARGINAL; <0.3 → 30 + PROC_GCPS_NO_VERTICAL_COVERAGE.
indicators.v1_limitation: Requires absolute GCP z-values not present in v1.7 reports -> always N/A; vertical coverage detection is v2.

indicators.threshold_summary: z/xy ≤1.5 → 100; 1.5-2 → 70 + PROC_Z_XY_HIGH; >2 → 30 + PROC_Z_XY_SEVERE.
per-marker: pix_err/mean ≤1.5 → 100; 1.5-2 → 70 + PROC_MARKER_PIX_HIGH; >2 → 30 + PROC_MARKER_PIX_SEVERE.
Composite condition (adequate GCPs + good GCP RMSE + bad CP RMSE) → 50 + PROC_RECONSTRUCTION_DRIFT (HIGH, diagnostic).
Markers > 0 → 100; Markers = 0 → 0 + PROC_NO_MARKERS_AT_ALL (CATASTROPHIC flag-only — score still computes from PPK-anchored bundle).

indicators.justification: SHEET (zero weight; flag also handled in CV7)
indicators.threshold_summary: 0 control points → PROC_NO_GCPS_USED (CRITICAL flag-only). Zero weight as score; flag fires loudly.

indicators.gate_action: deliverable_output_score=0; FLAG: PROC_OUTPUT_CRS_MISMATCH (CATASTROPHIC). Zeros processing_score via block.
indicators.threshold_summary: match → 100; mismatch → 0 + PROC_OUTPUT_CRS_MISMATCH (HARD GATE on Deliverable Output block).
projected EPSG → 100; geographic (e.g., EPSG:4326) → 30 + PROC_OUTPUT_CRS_GEOGRAPHIC (CRITICAL).

indicators.justification: SHEET (silent-invisible failure; distinct from CRS label check)
indicators.threshold_summary: match → 100; mismatch → 0 + PROC_INTERNAL_TRANSFORM_WRONG (CRITICAL). Distinct from DO1 (label) — this is the applied transform.
DTM not claimed → 100 (N/A); DTM claimed AND classification ran → 100; DTM claimed AND no classification → 30 + PROC_DSM_LABELLED_DTM.
low interpolation fraction → 100; high → 30 + PROC_DEM_INTERPOLATED_VOIDS (HIGH). Version-dependent: Agisoft v2+ reports void stats; older may not.
indicators.v1_limitation: v1.7 reports no void fraction -> N/A redistribute (no optimistic default). Agisoft v2+ reports the statistic.

indicators.threshold_summary: dem/gsd 1-3× → 100; 3-5× → 70 + PROC_DEM_RES_COARSE; 5-10× → 30 + PROC_DEM_RES_VERY_COARSE; >10× → 0.
all declared deliverables present → 100; some missing → flag PROC_DELIVERABLE_FILE_MISSING; affected per-deliverable views in v1.1 return null with file_missing reason.

indicators.justification: SHEET (v1 advisory only; v2 with maintained list)
indicators.threshold_summary: v1: declared baseline matches → 100; unknown → 60; in known-buggy list (v2) → 30 + PROC_SOFTWARE_VERSION_BUGGY (advisory in v1, zero scoring weight).

derived_fields.meaning: Reprojection error scoring threshold computation.
Fraction of cameras that aligned.
Camera position error as ratio of GSD — scale-independent quality measure.

derived_fields.formula_expression: check reportParams_optimization_parameters contains {f, b1, b2, cx, cy, k1, k2, k3, p1, p2}
derived_fields.meaning: How complete is the BA optimization parameter set?
Did precalibration expectation match actual loading?
Camera model consistency between declaration and report.

derived_fields.formula_expression: IF reportCameras_precalibrated=No AND abs(reportCalibration_k1_k2_correlation) > 0.95 AND (reportSurveyData_reprojection_error_pix > 2 OR reportGCP_check_rmse_total_cm > 2*manifest_accuracy_target_m * 100) THEN flag
derived_fields.meaning: Compound condition: ill-conditioned self-calibration only flagged when co-occurring with degraded reprojection or CP residuals (per v0.2 reviewer fix).
Ratio of max to RMS reprojection error — outlier detection.

derived_fields.formula_expression: reportParams_alignment_accuracy mapped to {High, Medium, Low} classes
derived_fields.meaning: Class membership of alignment accuracy setting.

derived_fields.formula_expression: reportParams_depth_quality mapped to {High, Medium, Low} classes
derived_fields.meaning: Class membership of depth map quality setting.
Tie point density.
Direct read; threshold-banded.
Filtering mode appropriateness for declared site type.

derived_fields.formula_expression: reportGCP_per_marker_image_count — per-marker count of images marker appears in
derived_fields.meaning: For per-marker triangulation strength scoring.

derived_fields.formula_expression: v1: IF tiepoint_density_per_km2 < 1M OR DEM has visible voids in reportDEM_void_statistics THEN partial-flag. v2: full density-map parse.
derived_fields.meaning: V1 partial detection via global proxies; full detection deferred to v2 visual analysis.

derived_fields.formula_expression: IF reprojection > 2 AND tie_density < 1M/km² AND camera_pos_xy > 15 cm THEN flag
derived_fields.meaning: Composite advisory cross-handoff to drone chain.
CP RMSE as multiple of accuracy target — primary moment-of-truth measure.
GCP RMSE as multiple of accuracy target.

derived_fields.formula_expression: per-CP: reportGCP_per_marker_residuals (filtered to CPs) / mean(CP residuals)
derived_fields.meaning: Per-CP residual as multiple of ensemble mean.
Per-marker role consistency between manifest declaration and Agisoft report.

derived_fields.formula_expression: reportGCP_marker_locations (control points) vs pp_gcp_coord_file_gcp_positions per-GCP comparison within noise tolerance
derived_fields.meaning: Per-GCP coordinate consistency between Agisoft report and pre_processing GCP coord file.

derived_fields.formula_expression: spatial coverage fraction of reportGCP_marker_locations (control points) over site extent
derived_fields.meaning: How well GCPs in bundle cover the survey extent.
GCP vertical spread relative to terrain vertical range.
Vertical vs horizontal residual ratio.
Per-marker image pixel residual as multiple of ensemble mean.

derived_fields.formula_expression: IF gcp_count >= 3 AND gcp_rmse_relative_to_target <= 1 AND cp_rmse_relative_to_target > 2 THEN composite-flag
derived_fields.meaning: Diagnostic composite: adequate control + good GCP residuals + bad CP residuals = terrain/coverage/atmospheric issue.
No markers at all (CATASTROPHIC flag-only).
No control points used in bundle (CRITICAL flag-only).
Output CRS match with project requirement.

derived_fields.formula_expression: parse EPSG of reportParams_coordinate_system, classify geographic vs projected
derived_fields.meaning: Whether output CRS is projected (suitable for survey measurements).
Internal georeferencing transform consistency with capture frame.

derived_fields.formula_expression: IF manifest_dtm_deliverable_claimed=True AND reportDEM_ground_classification_ran=False THEN flag
derived_fields.meaning: DTM claimed but ground classification not run = DSM-labelled-as-DTM.

derived_fields.formula_expression: parse reportDEM_void_statistics for void/hole interpolation fraction
derived_fields.meaning: Fraction of DEM area filled by interpolation across data voids (version-dependent field).
DEM resolution as multiple of image GSD.

derived_fields.formula_expression: For each in manifest_declared_deliverables: check corresponding deliverable_*_present.
derived_fields.meaning: Per-deliverable presence check.

derived_fields.formula_expression: v1: reportSystem_software_version vs manifest_software_version_baseline. v2: vs CBMI-maintained known-good/buggy list.
derived_fields.meaning: Software version classification (v1: declared baseline match; v2: known-buggy list maintained).
Direct read for verification_status determination.

source_fields.meaning: Number of images imported (Survey Data section).
Full correlation matrix between F, Cx, Cy, B1, B2, K1, K2, K3, P1, P2 calibration coefficients.
Specifically the K1-K2 correlation cell (high values indicate ill-conditioned self-calibration).
Number of markers designated as control points in bundle.
Number of markers designated as check points.
Total markers in Processing Parameters section.
Total RMSE on check points (cm) — moment-of-truth indicator.
Per-marker total residual (cm) — for per-CP outlier detection.
Per-marker image residual in pixels (with image count in parentheses).
Number of images each marker appears in (for triangulation strength).
Per-marker designated role (control vs check) as recorded in report.
Per-marker XYZ coordinates from Agisoft report.
DEM source (Dense cloud / Sparse cloud / Depth maps).
Accuracy setting (Highest / High / Medium / Low / Lowest).
List of parameters in BA optimization (e.g., f, b1, b2, cx, cy, k1-k3, p1, p2).
Depth maps quality (Ultra High / High / Medium / Low / Lowest).
Datum/geoid transform settings used during georeferencing (for internal transform check).
Was ground classification executed before DTM generation?
Required CRS for the project (e.g., EPSG:32647).
Survey accuracy target in meters (e.g., 0.02 for cm-grade).
CRS in which capture was performed (for internal transform consistency check).
Boolean: was pre-calibration expected to be loaded?
Per-marker declared role (control vs check) — for role-mismatch detection.
Site cover type (flat-structured / vegetated / mining-pit / mixed) — for filtering-mode appropriateness check.
List of expected deliverable types (ortho, dsm, dtm, point_cloud, mesh_3d).
Boolean: is DTM specifically claimed in deliverables (triggers ground-classification check).
Expected baseline software version (for version drift check; v2: known-good list).
CRS metadata in ortho file (geotiff CRS).
CRS metadata in point cloud file.
GCP coordinates from pre_processing GCP coord file (for typo cross-check).
Capture CRS as declared in pre_processing manifest.
Capture geoid as declared in pre_processing manifest.

source_files.physical_source: Output of Agisoft Metashape "Generate Report" workflow after processing complete
source_files.how_to_obtain: Operator generates report in Agisoft Metashape Pro after processing. Required input — processing_score = null without it.
source_files.notes: REQUIRED. Parser keys off section headers (Survey Data / Camera Calibration / Camera Locations / Ground Control Points / Digital Elevation Model / Processing Parameters) not page numbers. Agisoft version drift handled by header-based parsing.

source_files.physical_source: Filled by operator at survey upload
source_files.how_to_obtain: Operator declares: project required CRS, accuracy target, expected precalibration, declared camera model, declared marker roles (which markers were intended as GCPs vs CPs), declared site cover, declared deliverable types, declared software version.
source_files.notes: Cross-source comparison artifact. Manifest is operator-declarative; report is software-generated. Mismatches between them reveal errors.

source_files.how_to_obtain: Operator uploads deliverable files alongside the processing report. Used for per-deliverable views in v1.1 + CRS metadata cross-checks.
source_files.notes: v1.0 reads minimal data (CRS metadata, file presence). v1.1 per-deliverable views read deeper. When deliverable file absent → DO7 flag fires + per-deliverable view returns null.

source_files.file_extensions: Reads from pre-processing GCP coord file + pre_processing manifest
source_files.physical_source: Already in CBMI system from upstream chain
source_files.how_to_obtain: CBMI internal — pre_processing chain outputs are available for cross-source comparison.
source_files.notes: Used ONLY for cross-source comparison (CV5 GCP typo check, CV4 role consistency check, DO3 internal transform check). NOT a runtime dependency on pre_processing_score — reads pre_processing source artifacts/manifest, not its computed score.

flags.meaning: Output CRS does not match project requirement. Zeros processing_score via deliverable_output_score=0.
Zero markers — no ground truth at all. Bundle PPK-anchored only. Flag-only, not score gate per user decision.
Markers exist but all as check points; zero GCPs in bundle. PPK-anchored. Flag-only.
Bundle adjustment reprojection error elevated.
Bundle adjustment reprojection error high.
Bundle adjustment did not converge.
Some cameras failed to align.
Many cameras failed to align.
Severe camera alignment failure.
Camera position error elevated vs GSD.
Severe camera position error.
BA optimization parameter set missing b1/b2 (affinity/skew correction). Minor optimization preference per v1.0 pressure-test diagnostic — softened from MEDIUM.

flags.condition: manifest expected precalib loaded, report shows No
flags.meaning: Operator did not load precalibration when expected.

flags.condition: manifest camera model ≠ report camera model
flags.meaning: Camera model declared in manifest does not match Agisoft report.

flags.condition: precalibrated=No AND |K1-K2 corr| > 0.95 AND degraded reprojection/CP residuals
flags.meaning: Self-calibration ill-conditioned and showing consequences. v0.2 reviewer: compound condition to avoid universal false-positive flagging.
Reprojection outliers present (typical in practice).
Reprojection outliers severe.
Alignment accuracy setting below recommended.
Alignment accuracy setting catastrophically low.
Depth map quality Medium — common operator choice; advisory.
Depth map quality very low.
Tie point density sparse.
Tie point density very sparse.
Tie point multiplicity low.
Tie point multiplicity very low.
Depth filtering insufficient for site type.
Depth filtering over-smoothed for site type.
Marker visible in too few images for robust triangulation.
Marker insufficient images for triangulation.

flags.condition: tie_density <1M/km² OR DEM has visible voids
flags.meaning: Localized reconstruction collapse suspected. v1 partial via global proxies; v2 full via density-map visual analysis.

flags.condition: composite of reprojection + tie density + camera pos
flags.meaning: Atmospheric artifact suspected. Cross-handoff to drone chain.
Check-point residuals marginal — accuracy claim weakened.
Check-point residuals fail accuracy target — survey accuracy claim broken.
GCP residuals marginal.
GCP residuals high.
GCP control unusable.
Individual CP outlier.
Individual CP severely off.
Individual CP unusable.
Marker roles differ between declaration and Agisoft (covers CP→GCP and GCP→CP swaps).

flags.condition: report GCP coords ≠ pre_processing GCP coord file
flags.meaning: GCP coordinate entered in Agisoft differs from pre_processing source — likely typo.
CP count below statistical sufficiency.
CP count insufficient for statistical claim.
GCP count marginal for site extent.
GCP count insufficient.
GCPs in bundle partially clustered.
GCPs in bundle severely clustered.
GCP vertical coverage marginal.
GCPs do not cover terrain vertical extent.
Vertical residual elevated relative to horizontal.
Vertical residual severely elevated.
Marker image pixel residual elevated.
Marker image pixel residual severely elevated.

flags.condition: adequate GCPs + good GCP RMSE + bad CP RMSE
flags.meaning: Reconstruction drift composite diagnostic — terrain/coverage/atmospheric issue suspected.
Output CRS geographic not projected — linear measurements unreliable.
Internal georeferencing transform inconsistent with capture frame — silent-invisible failure (label correct, transform wrong).

flags.condition: DTM claimed + no ground classification ran
flags.meaning: DSM delivered as DTM (no ground classification).
DEM holes interpolated over voids — fabricated terrain in gap regions.
DEM coarser than image GSD warrants.
DEM very coarse vs GSD.

flags.condition: manifest declares deliverable but file not uploaded
flags.meaning: Declared deliverable file not uploaded — v1.1 per-deliverable view returns null for that deliverable.

flags.condition: software version in known-buggy list (v2 maintained)
flags.severity: MEDIUM (advisory, zero scoring weight in v1)
flags.meaning: Software version with known issues — v1: catalogued only; v2: scored when CBMI maintains list.
Target washed away/displaced — detected here via per-CP outlier residuals (CV3). Inherited from PP#32.
Per-deliverable fitness for customer use case — future delivery layer concern.

problem_coverage_map.covered_by: localized_reconstruction_score (IM7) — v1 global proxies; v2 density-map parsing

problem_coverage_map.problem: DSM Delivered as DTM (No Ground Classification)

per_deliverable_views.question: Given the same processing evidence, what is the quality story specifically for the orthomosaic?
per_deliverable_views.emphasis: Horizontal positional accuracy; image matching quality; bundle adjustment integrity; output frame correctness.
per_deliverable_views.null_handling: Returns null with reason=ortho_file_not_uploaded when ortho file absent. processing_score itself still computes normally.

per_deliverable_views.question: Given the same processing evidence, what is the quality story specifically for the DSM?
per_deliverable_views.emphasis: Vertical accuracy; depth map quality; filtering mode appropriateness; void interpolation handling.
per_deliverable_views.null_handling: Returns null with reason=dsm_file_not_uploaded when DSM file absent.

per_deliverable_views.question: Given the same processing evidence, what is the quality story specifically for the DTM (ground-only terrain)?
per_deliverable_views.emphasis: Ground classification ran; filtering mode for vegetation; vertical accuracy; void interpolation.
per_deliverable_views.null_handling: Returns null with reason=dtm_file_not_uploaded when DTM file absent.

per_deliverable_views.question: Given the same processing evidence, what is the quality story specifically for the dense point cloud?
per_deliverable_views.emphasis: Point density (depth quality drives this); filtering; tie point integrity; 3D positional accuracy.
per_deliverable_views.null_handling: Returns null with reason=point_cloud_file_not_uploaded when file absent.

per_deliverable_views.question: Given the same processing evidence, what is the quality story specifically for the 3D mesh?
per_deliverable_views.emphasis: Surface completeness; depth quality; tie point multi-view; camera alignment continuity.
per_deliverable_views.null_handling: Returns null with reason=mesh_3d_file_not_uploaded when file absent.
